---
title: "Replication Code for Flex Paper"
author: "Jihyeon bae"
date: "June 10th 2025"
output: html_document
---

# Setup and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library("pacman")
p_load(plyr, dplyr, tidyr, ggplot2, tidyverse, RColorBrewer, readxl,
       readr, haven, countrycode, clubSandwich, lmtest,plm,
       rqog, igoR, modelsummary, knitr, kableExtra, flextable, unvotes)

```

# Loading Raw data
```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

igo_analysis <- readRDS("~/Downloads/MA_data.RDS")

```

---


## Visualization
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(gplots)
plotmeans(poolconstit ~ year, main = "Variation across time", data = igo_analysis, 
          n.label=FALSE)
plotmeans(poolconstit ~ ioname, main = "Variation across IGOs", data = igo_analysis, 
          n.label=FALSE, 
          xlab="",
      mar=c(10.1,4.1,4.1,2.1), 
          las=2)
```

# Models
```{r, eval=FALSE}

y <- igo_analysis$poolconstit

model0 <-plm(y
            ~ polyarchy,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("year"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
summary(model0, vcovBK(model0, type="HC1", cluster="group"))

```

## Pooling 
vcovHC creates heteroskedasticity-consistent errors
```{r, eval=FALSE}
model1 <-plm(y
            ~ polyarchy_median+ gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization +
              number + political + social
            + economic + colonial + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp + hh_poly + ideal_sd,
            data = igo_analysis,
             index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),  
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
coeftest(model1, vcov=vcovBK(model1, type="HC1", cluster = "group"))


model2 <-plm(y
            ~ polyarchy + gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization +
              number + political + social 
             + colonial + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp + hh_poly + ideal_sd ,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),  
            data = igo_analysis,
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)


coeftest(model2, vcov=vcovBK(model2, type="HC1", cluster = c("group")))


model3 <-plm(y
            ~ percentage + gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization + number + political + social 
             + colonial + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp + hh_poly + ideal_sd ,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),  
            data = igo_analysis,
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)


coeftest(model3, vcov=vcovBK(model3, type="HC1", cluster = c("group")))


```
## Delegation
```{r, eval=FALSE}

y2 <- igo_analysis$delconstit


del0 <-plm(y2
            ~ polyarchy,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("year", "cow_igocode"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
coeftest(del0, vcovBK(del0, type="HC1", cluster="group"))

del1 <-plm(y2
            ~ polyarchy_median+ gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization + alliances +
              number + political + social
             + colonial + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp + hh_poly + ideal_sd,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("year", "cow_igocode"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
coeftest(del1, vcov=vcovBK(del1, type="HC1", cluster = "group"))

del2 <-plm(y2
            ~ polyarchy+ gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization + alliances +
              number + political + social
             + colonial + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp + hh_poly + ideal_sd,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("year", "cow_igocode"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
coeftest(del2, vcov=vcovBK(del2, type="HC1", cluster = "group"))


del3 <-plm(y2
            ~ percentage+ gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization + alliances +
              number + political + social
             + colonial + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp + hh_poly + ideal_sd,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("year", "cow_igocode"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
coeftest(del3, vcov=vcovBK(del3, type="HC1", cluster = c("group")))


```

# Results Visualization
```{r}
library(modelsummary)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(sandwich)
library(clubSandwich)

cm <- c('gdp_cap' = 'GDP Per Capita', 
        'population' = 'Population',
        'trade' = 'Trade', 
        'globalization' = 'Globalization', 
        'alliances' = 'Alliances',
        'colonial' = 'Colonial',
        'number' = 'Number',
        'political' = 'Political',
        'social' = 'Social',
        'hh_gdp'= 'Economy HHI',
        'hh_poly' = 'Polyarchy HHI',
        'ideal_sd'='Preference Heterogeneity',
        'polyarchy_sd' = 'Political Heterogeneity', 
        'percentage' = 'Percentage',
        'polyarchy_median' = 'Polyarchy Median',
        'polyarchy' = 'Polyarchy')

#Pooling
models <- list("Baseline"=model0, "Polyarchy Median"=model1, "Polyarchy Mean"=model2, "Percentage"=model3) 


library(kableExtra)

modelsummary(models,
  stars = TRUE,
  coef_omit = "Interc",
  output = "latex",
  title = "Regression Results",
  notes = list("+ p < 0.1; * p < 0.05; ** p < 0.01; *** p < 0.001"),
  booktabs = TRUE,
  escape = FALSE,
  fmt = 3
) %>%
  save_kable("pooling_table_clean.tex")


library(modelsummary)
library(ggplot2)

pooling_result <- modelplot(models, coef_omit = 'Interc', coef_map = cm) +
   theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey50","grey30", "grey10", "black"))+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Times New Roman", size = 14))


ggsave("pooling_result.pdf", plot = pooling_result, width = 6, height = 4)

#Delegation
models2 <- list("Baseline"=del0, "Polyarchy Median"=del1, "Polyarchy Mean"=del2, "Percentage"=del3) 

modelsummary(models2,  
             stars=TRUE,coef_map=cm,
          coef_omit = 'Interc')

modelplot(models2, coef_omit = 'Interc', coef_map=cm) +
    theme(text = element_text(family = "Times New Roman", size = 14))

```
